title: T-044 — Force-unlock scanner LP service (Admin)
prompt:
# T-044 — Force-unlock scanner LP service

PRD: `05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md` §6.11 (FR-WH-036), V-WH-LP-011.
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`.

## Goal
`forceUnlockLp(lpId, reason)` Server Action allowing Admin to clear a scanner lock with mandatory audit.

## Implementation contract
`apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/lp-force-unlock.ts`. RBAC: Admin only. Update license_plates SET locked_by=NULL, locked_at=NULL WHERE id=$lp; insert audit row 'scanner_lock_force_released' (admin_user_id, target_lp, original_holder, lock_duration_sec, reason). Reject if lock already free.

## Files (scope)
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/lp-force-unlock.ts [create]
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/__tests__/lp-force-unlock.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given an LP locked by another user and Admin caller, when forceUnlockLp runs, then locked_by/locked_at clear and audit row 'scanner_lock_force_released' exists.
2. Given a Manager caller (not Admin), when called, then RBAC error returns per V-WH-LP-011.
3. Given the LP is already unlocked, when called, then a no-op response returns and no audit row is added.

## Test strategy
- RED: lp-force-unlock.test.ts covers Admin success, RBAC denial, no-op.
- Run `pnpm --filter web test lp-force-unlock`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow non-Admin role.
- Do not skip the audit row.
- Do not log when already unlocked (avoid noise).

pipeline_inputs.description: Admin-only force-unlock scanner LP with audit row 'scanner_lock_force_released'.
pipeline_inputs.details: Single transaction; no-op when already unlocked.
acceptance_criteria: Given Admin caller and LP locked by other user, when run, then locked_by/locked_at clear and audit row exists
Given Manager caller, when run, then RBAC error returns
Given the LP is already unlocked, when run, then no-op returns and no audit row added
test_strategy: RED: lp-force-unlock.test.ts covers Admin success, RBAC, no-op
